description: Google Cloud Memorystore for Memcached is Google Cloud’s managed Memcached service for creating and operating Memcached instances. The service is used to provision, configure, and manage cache instances within Google Cloud projects.
summary: memcache.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Memorystore for Memcached management REST API, and Google Cloud CLI commands (`gcloud memcache`) that operate against it; both use Google Cloud OAuth/Application Default Credentials.

surfaces.name: Google Cloud Memorystore for Memcached API
